A New Life in the Sun

programme.title: Match Point
programme.desc: At a turning point in his life, a former tennis pro falls for an actress who happens to be dating his friend and soon-to-be brother-in-law.

programme.title: The Bounty
programme.desc: The story of a 1789 mutiny on the H.M.S. Bounty in which a voyage to Tahiti turns a crew against it's Captain when they find tropical paradise and unlimited sex, but the Captain decides to leave and take his crew on a perilous voyage around Cape Horn.

programme.title: Barbershop
programme.desc: Calvin, who inherited a struggling barbershop, views the shop as nothing but a burden and waste of his time. After selling the shop to a local loan shark, Calvin slowly begins to see his father's vision and legacy .

programme.title: Scoop
programme.desc: An American journalism student in London scoops a big story, and begins an affair with an aristocrat as the incident unfurls.

programme.title: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: A hard-working small business owner and his two associates travel to Europe to close the most important deal of their lives. But what began as a routine business trip goes off the rails in every way imaginable, and unimaginable.

programme.title: Lessons in Love
programme.desc: A drama about a Cambridge poetry professor who begins to re-evaluate his life of Byronic excess.

programme.title: Queen of the Blues
programme.desc: Mary Millington is Queen of the Blues - Mayfair's most famous stripper. She must use her pleasing assets to defuse the ongoing criminal activity, surrounding the nightclub she performs in.

programme.title: Bikini Nuns
programme.desc: A fearless trio of nuns is out for revenge. After being wronged by ruthless men, they trade their habits for high-powered weapons, taking justice into their own hands.

programme.title: The Torture Chamber Of Dr. Sadism
programme.desc: German gothic horror with psychedelic visuals.

programme.title: A Genius, Two Partners and a Dupe
programme.desc: Gunfighter Joe Thanks (the “genius”) combines a complicated scam on a pompous official with the help of Locomotive Bill and his friend Lucy, with the intention of returning illegally embezzled money to the Indians.

programme.title: Geronimo
programme.desc: In 1883, Geronimo and his small group of Apache warriors, under constant attack from both U.S. and Mexican military forces, reluctantly surrender in exchange for food and land. But promises are broken, and the Apaches declare all-out war on the U.S.

programme.title: Buck and the Magic Bracelet
programme.desc: Buck is the canine guardian of a camp of gold miners led by Zeb and his son Kevin. When a sadistic gang invades the camp, Buck demonstrates the wisdom of a thousand men by allowing himself to be caught!

programme.title: Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A Bruce Lee Classic! Lee plays Chen Zhen, a student of Huo Yuanjia, who fights to defend the honor of the Chinese in the face of foreign aggression, and to bring to justice those responsible for his master's death.

programme.title: Go for It
programme.desc: Two men meet each other in a strange situation and end up being mistaken for robbers first, for secret service agents later.

programme.title: Double Impact
programme.desc: Identical twins are separated at six months and raised on different continents. They reunite twenty-five years later to avenge the murder of their parents and reclaim their stolen family fortune.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: The Client
programme.desc: The Mafia wants to keep 11-year-old Mark Sway quiet, and a federal prosecutor wants to learn exactly what he knows. So Mark finds a lawyer who's smart and tough, and she wants to help him. If he can only trust her…

programme.title: Family Games
programme.desc: Sloane and her boyfriend Barrett return to her childhood home determined to ruin her father Roan's re-marriage. Family secrets surface and give rise to a puzzling future.

programme.title: Multiverse
programme.desc: Four brilliant students unleash a parallel reality during a quantum experiment, confronting deadly versions of themselves. As identities blur and tensions rise, only one version can survive—triggering a violent battle for existence and reality itself.

programme.title: Darkside
programme.desc: It is the last, great war. Out of the wreckage of a troop transport, five soldiers find themselves stranded on the dark side of the moon. Cut off and behind enemy lines, they start a dangerous journey back to their home territory.

programme.title: Cube Zero
programme.desc: A young programmer whose job is to watch over the reality-warping Cube defies orders to rescue an innocent mother trapped in one of its rooms.

programme.title: Bogus
programme.desc: When 7-year-old Albert's mother is suddenly killed in an auto accident, he and his imaginary French friend "Bogus" take up residence with his no-nonsense aunt Harriet.

programme.title: Pudsey The Dog: The Movie
programme.desc: Pudsey The Dog: The Movie is ‘Babe’ meets ‘Marley and Me’ - a cheeky and downright hilarious animal adventure for the whole family! Oh and by the way… there are songs too!

programme.title: The Mighty Macs
programme.desc: In the early 70s, Cathy Rush becomes the head basketball coach at a tiny, all-girls Catholic college. Though her team has no gym and no uniforms Coach Rush looks to steer her girls to their first national championship.

programme.title: Jail: Handle with Care
programme.desc: Officers try to deal with a sloppy and combative drunk.

programme.title: Jail: Wedlock-Up
programme.desc: A couple's wedding plans are ruined after officers find their meth.

programme.title: Jail: LV NYE
programme.desc: We follow the New Year's Eve festivities up and down the Las Vegas Strip.

programme.title: Jail: Fragrant & Flagrant
programme.desc: A cologne salesman boasts and promotes his "magic potion".

programme.title: Jail: Pizza Problems
programme.desc: A dad gets busted for DUI while on his way to pick up a pizza.

programme.title: Jail: Mas Tequila
programme.desc: Tequila is to blame when a man's behavior gets him locked up.

programme.title: Jail: Crushin
programme.desc: An inmate attempts to procure enhancing supplements from a jail nurse.

programme.title: Jail: One Too Many Times
programme.desc: A man learns it‰Ûªs not good to light up a joint next to a crime scene.

programme.title: Jail: Look Away
programme.desc: A fight breaks out after one woman accuses the other of staring at her.

programme.title: Jail: Alien Among Us
programme.desc: A man believes he is an alien wrongfully arrested for obstruction.

programme.title: Jail: Fight Night
programme.desc: A woman pummels a nightclub security guard for an unusual reason.

programme.title: Magic Magic
programme.desc: Alicia arrives in South America to vacation with her cousin, Sara. When Sarah is suddenly called away, Alicia is stuck on a remote island off Chile with three of Sara's friends, including Brink, an American exchange student with a sadistic streak.

programme.title: Odd Thomas
programme.desc: In a California desert town, a short-order cook with clairvoyant abilities encounters a mysterious man with a link to dark, threatening forces. Starring: Anton Yelchin, Ashley Sommers, Leonor Varela, Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Poltergeist III
programme.desc: In the climactic finale to the Poltergeist trilogy, those elusive demons are more frightening than ever as they follow Carol Anne to Chicago and inhabit an entire skyscraper.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine and Nick investigate a case in which a guilty man was proven innocent.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team is joined by a new CSI, Michael Keppler, who assists them on a case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine reluctantly agrees to help Keppler deceive the team in order to catch a murderer

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Nick and Keppler investigate when a charred body is discovered with organs removed.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Keppler is forced to face his past when an old face turns up asking him for a favour.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom is sent a miniature crime scene in a cardboard box to solve before it happens.

programme.title: Scorpion: Faux Money Maux Problems
programme.desc: When Team Scorpion is duped into producing counterfeit money for a foreign entity intent on ruining the U.S. economy, Paige must rely on her mother Veronica's skills as a grifter to save them.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must save a man teetering on the edge of a massive sink hole that threatens to destroy the Los Angeles water supply forever.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sharknerdo
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's job to find sunken treasure goes awry when Walter and Paige's boat explodes, leaving them lost in the middle of the Pacific Ocean surrounded by sharks.

programme.title: Scorpion: Keep It In Check, Mate
programme.desc: Walter and Sylvester enter an international chess competition undercover on foreign soil for Team Scorpion in order to extricate a U.S. spy before her identity is exposed.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dirty Seeds, Done Dirt Cheap
programme.desc: When a simple mission to protect a vital seed bank goes awry, Team Scorpion must save Happy, Sylvester and Cabe, who begin suffering from life-threatening, fear-based hallucinations.

programme.title: Scorpion: Don't Burst My Bubble
programme.desc: Following a severe storm, Happy's friend Ada, who lives in a sterile bubble to protect her compromised immune system, is left with dangerous debris on the verge of puncturing the structure.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Wanting
programme.desc: When a tenement-building shooting leads to the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must race to find the killer before a gang war breaks out

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar that’s a possible hub for illegal handguns, Chris’s erratic behavior and concern for a specific drug dealer make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road to interview a list of inmates at Millburn Penitentiary.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: In the midst of a chaotic day at the station, Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: Chris’s addiction issues come to a head when an innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a suspicious home invasion investigation

programme.title: Rookie Blue: "Moving Day"
programme.desc: 15 Division is assigned to a community outreach program, “Moving Day”, to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: After the fall of Rome, its last emperor (Thomas Sangster), a 12-year-old boy, journeys to Britannia with his closest retainers (Colin Firth, Ben Kingsley) to find a fabled legion.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Betrayed by his stepfather, the King, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers to fight his way back to his rightful kingdom.

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian
programme.desc: The Cimmerian warrior slashes his way across Hyboria on a mission that begins as a personal vendetta but turns into an epic battle against a supernatural evil.

programme.title: Clockwise

programme.title: Life Is a Circus
programme.desc: The Crazy Gang need to save their travelling circus from bankruptcy. Thankfully, they have an Aladdin's Lamp containing its own genie to grant the wishes they need to get this show back on the road.

programme.title: R.A.F
programme.desc: Documentary about the Royal Air Force featuring training of new recruits and aircraft of the period.

programme.title: Daybreak
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a hangman's assistant gets into a fight after he tries to seduce his boss's wife.

programme.title: Britain's Secret Islands: Episode 3

programme.desc: Venture to England's South Coast, as we dive with sharks, explore the battlements of Drake's Island, uncover the origins of Scouts, and discover fossils on the Isle of Wight.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt for Cursed Treasure takes us to the Bay of Naples and the doomed Roman city of Pompeii, where items stolen by tourists have created misery and misfortune.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt takes us to the Parthenon in the ancient city of Athens, where the removal of some priceless artefacts brought shipwreck, imprisonment, loss, and disfigurement.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt begins in the historical Kingdom of Benin, Africa. Destroyed in 1897, with its city burned to the ground and precious artefacts looted, did this bloody and violent end lead to a curse?

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt for Cursed Treasure begins in Cheshire, England where a discovery by peat-cutters revealed a story of violence, ritual sacrifice and even whispers of a curse.

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: Kane and his team put the pieces together and figure out things aren’t exactly how they appear…

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: ICS races to prevent a deadly terrorist attack in the heart of Toronto.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: Kessler, Gray, and Layla are trapped aboard a quarantined freighter with a captain who’s accused of murdering stowaways.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: ICS must prevent the assassination of a visiting Cuban diplomat who has a surprising connection to U.S. Agent Bianca Lagarda.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: When his daughter takes part in an anti-nuclear rally, Kessler is suspected of leaking classified information that leads directly to nuclear sabotage.

programme.title: Cougar Club
programme.desc: Two slacker college graduates determined to break free from their soul-destroying jobs start their own business, running a club where older women can pick up young men.

programme.title: JAG: Sightings

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU are called in to contain a riot at a maximum-security prison and begin to suspect it’s all a cover for a daring prison break.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A bitter child custody battle sparks a critical incident and the SRU must use a risky “rolling roadblock” maneuver to rescue the children.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One must locate and rescue a politician before a vengeful radio shock jock kills him on the air.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU are called in to resolve a gas station robbery but discover it’s connected to a deadly crisis on a cult compound.

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.desc: Matlock is accused of bribing a witness.

programme.desc: A crooked photographer is murdered.

programme.desc: A newlywed is charged with murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Doctors

programme.title: A Future on Stage: The Making of a Broadway Musical
programme.desc: In A Future on Stage: The Making of a Broadway Musical, the creators of Back to the Future fight to bring their beloved franchise to the stage.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: Bob Kane and Bill Finger’s costumed hero leaped off the page and onto the screen in 1966, but it wasn’t the dark detective fans anticipated.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: With an injured star, a troublesome vehicle, and an unyielding suit production is off to a rocky start. Can the producers and director work out their differences to land this dark superhero film? Or will disputes over the ending drop them all off a tower?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: After the success of Batman 89, the studio was ready for round two, but their director was not. Given free reign, Burton and his handpicked team went wild. But would his dark vision scare away their target audience?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: A new director brings his own colorful aesthetic, but who is really in charge? A fraught production drives away his star yet delivers the toy friendly Batman the studio wanted. But when the sequel goes over the top, the franchise hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Flux Gourmet
programme.desc: Set at an institute devoted to culinary and alimentary performance, a collective finds themselves embroiled in power struggles, artistic vendettas and gastrointestinal disorders.

programme.title: Barking Dogs Never Bite
programme.desc: In Bong Joon-ho's directorial debut, a couple is driven to distraction by a yapping dog located in their apartment complex. Determined to relieve their annoyance, they take extreme action against his tormentor.

programme.title: Buena Vista Social Club
programme.desc: A group of elder forgotten Cuban music legends emerge from obscurity when an American producer reunites them in Havana, leading to spectacular performances that reignite their musical legacy.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Hotline
programme.desc: After three women are found strangled, Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate whether or not there is a connection between the attacks and an erotic hotline. Also starring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are assigned by Internal Affairs to check out a security leak among the 14th Precinct's personnel, forcing the duo to reluctantly spy on their colleagues. Also starring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Mr. Lonelyhearts
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are called in when an elderly man comes looking for his wife. But a simple missing persons case soon turns into a major bigamy and fraud case. All the while Cagney deals with a suitor.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Conduct Unbecoming
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) team together with another detective, Charles Stephens (guest star Christopher Allport), to investigate an illegal handgun operation. However, their investigation is impeded by Charles's suspension.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: I'll Be Home For Christmas
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are looking forward to an early release on Christmas Eve when a man dressed as Santa Claus (guest star Richard Masur), who has been arrested for charity fraud, escapes from his cell in the 14th precinct.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Recreational Use
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey team up with Sergeant Dory McKenna (guest star Barry Primus) in an investigation of a group of senior citizens terrorized by their landlord. Cagney's romance with Dory is complicated by his addiction to cocaine.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Great BMX Race
programme.desc: To help Toad pay off his debt to Fry Guy, Mario and Luigi enter a bike race in hopes to collect the prize money. But what they don't know is that it's all a trap planned by Koopa.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Crimes R Us/Life's Ruff
programme.desc: King Koopa and his evil horde orchestrate the escape of an infamous criminal./The mischievous Koopa Kids Hip and Hop snatch King Windbag's magic wand and zap him and Luigi.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario and Joliet
programme.desc: In the Land of Romance, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, who had been called to the Land of Romance by a friend of Princess Toadstool, are currently trapped in a rapidly crumbling building.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Pirates of Koopa
programme.desc: In Pirate Waters, located in Pirate World, Mario and Luigi are in the middle of peeling potatoes onboard a ship.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: The Venice Menace/Super Koopa
programme.desc: When a gondola suddenly warps into the Mushroom Kingdom, Mario and Luigi discover Venice./Kooky Von Koopa makes a magic pendant that gives King Koopa the power to become Super Koopa!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Stars in their Eyes
programme.desc: In the depths of space, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are all aboard a yellow spaceship, which is currently traveling through a swarm of flaming meteors.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Love 'em and Leave 'em
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Rotunda Land, which is ruled by the uptight Queen Rotunda. After being caught, Mario unintentionally gets Rotunda to drink a love potion, causing her to fall in love with him, much to his dismay.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Reign Storm/Toddler Terrors Of Time Travel
programme.desc: The Princess goes on her very first vacation to the real world Hawaii. King Koopa and Kooky Von Koopa travel back in time to defeat the Mario Brothers.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Jungle Fever
programme.desc: In the Amazon Jungle, Mario, using a plunger to swat his way through a variety of flora, leads Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool in their search for Dr. Sheldon, a mysterious witch doctor.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Adventures of Sherlock Mario
programme.desc: In Victoria, Mario and Luigi are riding atop a carriage being pulled by a horse traveling down a street in search of a great detective by the name of Herlock Solmes, with Toad and Princess Toadstool riding in the carriage.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: King Mario of Cramalot
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Cramalot, only to be assualted by Beezos. They are saved by Mervin the magician, who tells them about how Koopa took over Cramalot.

programme.title: Hurricane: The Anatomy
programme.desc: This episode looks at how plants and animals cope with the annual onslaught in the hurricane zone.

programme.title: Our World is on Fire
programme.desc: Climate change is now a crisis, and our world is crying out. Examine some possible remedies to the emergency.

programme.title: Hurricane: The Anatomy
programme.desc: With coastal habitats and natural defenses irretrievably damaged, the future appears bleak.

programme.title: Living with Volcanoes
programme.desc: Volcanologists are ready to face any challenge to quench their thirst for knowledge

programme.title: Disasters in Space
programme.desc: Relive the harrowing moments in Launch Control during NASA's second "Return to Flight" test flight .

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Updates on memorable hoarders including Constance, Shannon, Kevin, Augustine and Ruth.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Experts help Constance whose home is full of chickens and rotting eggs. They also meet Jeri Jo, who began hoarding when her husband was jailed for life.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Over the past two decades, Carol has hoarded her husband's home. With the mansion threatened to be condemned, the family unites to try to save the house and confront Carol about her behaviour.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: A woman racks up $50,000 in credit card debt as she fills her home with mountains of unnecessary clothing, and a woman's collection of cardboard boxes threatens to force her out of her own house.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rush from Judgment
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her bondsman, Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Willie & Korie's Anniversorry
programme.desc: The Robertson family throws a party for Willie & Korie's 25th anniversary, but things take a dramatic turn when Willie and Korie reveal a big secret. Meanwhile, when Jase blames Uncle Si for getting him a parking ticket.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Burn & Return
programme.desc: Dog is busy. First, he's after a fugitive who is allegedly an expert in the game of "burn and return"- shoplifting goods to return them for cash refunds. But he's not easy to track.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Statue of Imitations
programme.desc: When Willie asks a local chainsaw artist to make him a statue, he gets a big surprise when it's revealed that the statue is of an unlikely subject - Willie himself. Meanwhile, Jep and Jessica attempt to help Kay with her hoarding.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Stormy Weather
programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today, it's the threat of severe thunderstorms, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A Decent Proposal
programme.desc: On a trip to New York, Jase's son Reed proposes to his girlfriend, which inspires his father to fan the flames of romance back home with Missy. Meanwhile, Sadie asks Willie to be a guest lecturer at her business class.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: One for the Money
programme.desc: It hurts Dog to see people who after years of walking the straight and narrow, suddenly lose their way. But today's case is a member of the law enforcement community who has recently gone astray, and that truly troubles the Dog.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Father Knows Pest
programme.desc: The tables are turned when the HOA comes to Jase for help to rid the neighborhood of a menacing beaver. Little Will has just gotten his learner's permit, and Willie and Si argue over which of them is the better driving instructor.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Reality Check

programme.desc: Nathaniel Bar-Jonah, a paedophile, is convicted in 2002 for multiple crimes but not for the 1996 disappearance of Zachary Ramsay. Zachary’s body is never found, and Bar-Jonah dies in prison in 2008.

programme.desc: In a gruesome 1989 case, Tracey Wigginton and her accomplices lure Edward Baldock with promises of a good time, only to brutally stab him to death, sparking a sensational trial that raised questions about the roles of her accomplices.

programme.desc: A young woman named Kristy has been haunted in her own bedroom since she can remember. Now it's up to Ryan and the crew to help Kristy before she's overwhelmed by the entity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dead Legends
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey investigate the famed Hotel Conneaut in northern Pennsylvania. Heavy doors opening on their own, sightings of a boy, a bride and a menacing butcher have the hotel's staff on edge.

programme.title: Most Haunted S24
programme.desc: With the night getting ever more active and poltergeist activity growing, something seems to target one of the team. And what activity could make Glen state ‘’that is paranormal’’.

programme.title: Most Haunted S24
programme.desc: Tired from this long investigation, the team continue where one of them realises that the idea to investigate along was a mistake, but can the others get there in time. And something has a final message for the team as they leave.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette leads her team to Belan Fort for its first paranormal investigation. Strange activity starts immediately, and one member is scared out of their wits.

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: Dynasty: The Trial

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jasmine & Mike
programme.desc: Jasmine has been texting with Mike for two years and thinks he could be the perfect step-father for her son. Although they live only 15 minutes apart, the pair have yet to meet up in person. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jarrod & Abby
programme.desc: How do young people who've embraced the digital age find love? Often by connecting online with others they've never met in person before. The problem -- that cute guy you may be falling in love with could be lying about who he really is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kya & Alyx
programme.desc: In this episode we meet Kya and Alyx, who fell in love quickly after meeting online. Are they being honest with each other? Hosts Nev Schulman and Max Joseph investigate. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Joe & Kari Ann
programme.desc: Joe was sceptical when Miss Teen USA, Kari, sent him a friend request. Now, after months of communication, Joe thinks it might be the real deal, and he might have found love with her. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tyler & Amanda
programme.desc: After a year and a half of chatting with her online, Tyler thinks he may have a future with Amanda. But are Tyler's friends correct because they suspect that something isn't right? (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rod & Ebony
programme.desc: Rod met Ebony on a dating web site four years ago, now it's time for the two to meet in person. Is Ebony who she says she is? What will happen when they meet in real life for the first time? (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Lover's Knot
programme.desc: In the midst of delicate operations to identify the chief of an espionage ring, Jim Phelps realizes that Paris has fallen in love with an enemy agent on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Orpheus
programme.desc: Jim Phelps assumes a risky pose as a drug addict with information to sell to get behind the Iron Curtain where he seeks to stop an unknown assassin from killing an unknown victim on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Crane
programme.desc: After rescuing a prisoner from execution by a dictator (guest star Carl Betz), the IMF has to find a hiding place so conspicuous it will be overlooked by police hunting the fugitive on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Death Squad
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF to aid one of its own members when Barney is arrested and marked for execution by a sadistic police chief (guest star Pernell Roberts) on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Choice
programme.desc: Paris is marked for execution when he impersonates a power-mad mystic trying to win control of a friendly country by hypnotizing its woman ruler on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Sis Ducks Out
programme.desc: Big Sis drops some bad news as the guys clash with Carolyn over a carnival unit at an auction in Long Beach. Ton and Allen unearth a Native American tomahawk, a dunk tank and a rare gun that can fire three shots at once.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Pucks for Bucks
programme.desc: The guys get stuck with a unit they didn't want and have to sort through trash to make their bottom line. They uncover glass blowing tools, autographed baseballs and a hockey puck launcher, which puts Ton in the line of fire.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Nothing But Net
programme.desc: Ton and Allen face their toughest challenge yet when two old rivals join forces. The guys dig up an off-road motorcycle and a pair of net guns, while the staff clashes with mystery shoppers back at Haff Ton Pawn.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: Chelsea's dad tries to cut Adam out of her life, Jenelle is arrested for breaking and entering, Kailyn signs a joint custody agreement and Leah and Corey tie the knot. Last in the series.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Finale Special: Check Up With Dr. Drew
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts the cast of Teen Mom 2 on-stage in front of a live studio audience. Jenelle, Chelsea, Kailyn and Leah reflect on the struggles of their first year of motherhood.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 1 Unseen Moment
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts a look at the humour and the heartbreaking moments never before seen with Kailyn, Leah, Jenelle and Chelsea from the first season of Teen Mom 2.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: Jenelle is back with Kieffer after bailing him out of jail, but everything hits the fan when Barbara finds out that she's been lying about Kieffer and kicks her out.

programme.title: NEW Karamo

programme.desc: Quandra believes that her sister Deidra's fiancé Jamar, is a cheating and manipulative liar! But Jamar says that Deidra doesn't appreciate him and that when he leaves to go out, it's because he wants time for himself.

programme.desc: Danny thinks his neighbor is a menace after throwing a rock through Danny's car window and causing continued damages.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hodroyd Hall

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gloucester Prison P2

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ben Whittaker

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Kokoda Track in World War II was a treacherous mountainous trail in Papua New Guinea, where intense jungle warfare unfolded between Australian and Japanese forces during the Kokoda Track campaign, marking a crucial phase in the Pacific theater.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of the Gilbert Islands in WW II was a pivotal amphibious assault by the U.S. against heavily fortified Japanese positions, resulting in intense, costly fighting and ultimately securing a crucial step in the Central Pacific island strategy.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Marshall Islands were strategically significant in World War II as their capture by the United States provided forward bases for airfields and naval operations, facilitating the Allied island-hopping campaign towards Japan in the Pacific theater.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: Battle of Guadalcanal in WW II was a fiercely contested six-month-long campaign between Allied and Japanese forces, primarily fought on land, sea, and air around the Solomon Islands.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of Peleliu in World War II was a grueling amphibious assault by U.S. forces against heavily fortified Japanese positions on the Pacific island, lasting from September to November 1944 and resulting in significant casualties on both sides.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The fighting on Iwo Jima in WW II involved intense and brutal combat between U.S. Marines and entrenched Japanese forces on a strategically crucial volcanic island in the Pacific.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of Okinawa in WW II was a fierce and prolonged amphibious assault by Allied forces against well-defended Japanese positions on the island, marking the largest and bloodiest battle in the Pacific theater.

programme.desc: A special episode of Bionic Bunny is interrupted, and Arthur and friends try to remember what comes next. D.W. is excited to be taking care of the class bunny, Larry. But Larry is feeling adventurous and and wanders off.

programme.title: Arthur: Baseball Blues/Brain's Biggest Blunder
programme.desc: It's Grebelings season and George can't wait to play! After all, no one knows more about baseball than George. Then, wBrain gets teamed with Buster and Binky in the annual Arithmattack competition.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Aims High/Flaw and Order
programme.desc: D.W. wants to be the first person to set foot on Mars! But what if scary purple aliens eat her? Who's responsible for cracking Dad's cake platter? DUN-DUN! All the evidence points to Arthur!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ wants to learn Terry's fancy basketball moves. After some advice from Barney, BJ has fun while doing his best! On a campout, Baby Bop sees a falling star and wants to return it to the sky.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play for Exercise!
programme.desc: The children are surprised to learn that playing games and having fun in the park is great exercise. Baby Bop is happy to learn that not only is she exercising while she plays, but exercise will make her grow big and strong.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Music Box
programme.desc: The kids are having a yard sale, getting rid of old toys, books and clothes. Kioko shows up holding a prized possession—a music box from Switzerland. By accident, Ben includes the music box in a cardboard box of yard sale items!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Showtime!
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a performance for their friends in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Splish! Splash!
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Friends the Doctor
programme.desc: Time for a check-up! Barney helps his friends discover the world of doctors and dentists as they learn about healthy habits like brushing teeth, getting checkups, eating healthy foods and getting exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. Everyone is anxiously awaiting Mrs. Matuma’s Harambee Dance Troupe to arrive.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Your Birthday, Barney
programme.desc: Every day with Barney is fun—but today is extra special. It's Barney's birthday!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Layla and her friends celebrate her birthday in the park with foods that aren’t traditionally American.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Mister Ogg Goes to Town
programme.desc: When Krang realizes the Technodrome is running low on liquid nitrogen, its main source of fuel, he discovers that a formula exists in Dimension Z which transmutes crude oil, easily available on Earth, into liquid nitrogen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredderville
programme.desc: Because of all the destruction Shredder causes just trying to get rid of the Turtles, they lament that the world would be a better place had they never existed.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Bye - Bye Fly!
programme.desc: Plotting revenge, Baxter, who has been turned into a fly-like creature, delivers a borellium crystal to Krang and Shredder whose Technodrome is low in power.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Ripoff
programme.desc: The Technodrome is perilously close to running out of power as it teeters on the edge of a crumbling lava cliff deep within the bowels of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Break-In
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder get the Technodrome rolling again and raise it to the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Blow-Out
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder raise the Technodrome to the surface and seize unlimited energy. The Turtles and the World face their darkest hour.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Plan Six from Outer Space
programme.desc: The Turtles launch the missile from the sewers positioned under the Technodrome. It transports Bebop, Rocksteady, Krang and Shredder back to Dimension X but explodes on impact; they survive.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles of the Jungle
programme.desc: Donatello's idol, inventor mad-scientist Professor Willard creates the Molecular Intensifier, a machine to control growth of living things.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Toys Around
programme.desc: Michelangelo dreams he's being attacked by Tyranno-toys. He wakes up to hear April announcing the Toy Fair opening. Determined to go, Michelangelo disguises himself as a Turtle toy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Peking Turtles
programme.desc: April O'Neil reports from the Uptown Museum about a display of artifacts from the 2000-year-old Ying Dynasty of China. The marble warriors were built to protect the world's largest pearl from being stolen from the Emperor's collection of jewels.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder's Mother
programme.desc: The earth is experiencing global warming and Krang and Shredder threaten to expose it to increased catastrophic weather conditions.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy has prepared himself a TV dinner to eat in front of his favourite series, but his moment of pleasure is abruptly interrupted by unexplained static.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings are having a rave party. When Grizzy throws their stereo into the river, he sparks a general power outage and is unable to watch his favourite shows.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he realises that his beloved she-bear adores the smell of flowers, Grizzy decides to offer her the geraniums that decorate the window ledges of the ranger's cabin.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: After making a fool of himself in front of the she-bear, Grizzly is ousted from the cabin by the Lemmings. But Grizzly's luck is about to change.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy can't believe his eyes when he sees objects moving all by themselves. He soon realises it's the Lemmings who are playing around with a magnet.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is persuaded that the she-bear he's in love with has been turned into a frog. Whilst he looks through books of fairy tales, searching for a means to return his beloved to her original form, the Lemmings try to recover the frog.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly discovers a baby raccoon not far from the log cabin. When he sees its big moist eyes, Grizzly melts and adopts the creature. When the Lemmings drag the baby into their dangerous games, the overprotective Grizzly steps in.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers the pleasures of video games on the ranger's console. The Lemmings want to try their hand at the joystick but Grizzy refuses to interrupt his kart racing game.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy builds a look-alike robot to keep the Lemmings away while he prepares a party for his beloved she-bear. But his double's artificial intelligence leaves a lot to be desired.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly's she-bear is convinced she's a lemming after hitting her head. Grizzly believes another well-aimed hit will correct her thinking, but the Lemmings are thrilled to have a new playmate.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When a meteorite falls not far from the log cabin, strange berries start to grow. One of their properties is that they make anyone who eats them grow to disproportionate sizes.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Under the wood floor of the log cabin, Grizzy and the Lemmings discover the entrance to an underground gallery with an old treasure card that indicates the location of a treasure.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he brandishes an Indian sceptre that the Lemmings brought home with other antique objects, Grizzy sees the Lemmings bow low before him and behave like servants.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy tries to impress the she-bear that he's in love with by making a sculpture of her from a piece of wood. But as soon as the artist's back is turned, the Lemmings gnaw at the work of art in order to transform it into a toboggan slide.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: When Professor Oak makes a surprise appearance in Hoenn, bringing along Bulbasaur, Charmander, and Squirtle, Ash joins forces with them to battle Team Rocket.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: When another pair of Trainers challenge Ash and May to a Tag Battle, a falling-out between the two friends causes them to lose—but they soon resolve their differences.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: When May accidentally enters a forbidden spot where only Grass-type Pokémon live, she quickly befriends a Bulbasaur.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: In an attempt to help May train her new Bulbasaur, Ash asks Professor Oak to send his own Bulbasaur to him, but someone diverts the transport…

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: When a famed Whiscash swallows Ash's Gym badges, he teams up with a fisherman to try to reel it in!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Ash and Pikachu meet up with an aspiring archaeologist who leads them to an ancient and mystical site.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: May prepares to enter a prestigious contest, open only to Coordinators who have already won a ribbon! Her rival Drew seems to be the favorite with his powerful Masquerain.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: May decides to use Bulbasaur in the Rubello Town Contest. Will its lack of experience cost her a ribbon?

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: When a Spoink loses the pearl on its head, Ash and friends volunteer to help search for it.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Ash, May, and James participate in the Pokéringer Competition, a curious sporting event in which Trainers direct their flying Pokémon in a race to collect rings dangling from floating balloons.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies want to go to sleep, but Tinky Winky finds Po already asleep in his bed. So he goes to look for somewhere else to sleep.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies line up to say 'Eh-oh' and then watch Matthew and Mark feed a baby calf. The Teletubbies play a game to see who can eat their Tubby Custard the slowest, but Po can't wait and eats her Tubby Custard very fast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It’s time for Tubby Toast. Po and Tinky Winky are so excited, they fall over. They join Dipsy and Laa-Laa to watch two children dig a big mud hole.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies giggle as they play their 'Through the Arch' game. The windmill stops them to watch a little girl and her dad go for a walk in the town.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies walk in sideways, then run off to watch a little boy play cricket with his dad. In Teletubbyland,Tinky Winky runs away with Laa-Laa’s ball. Laa-Laa chases after him, through the house, over the hills and behind the trees.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A group of children sing some Christmas carols to the Teletubbies. Tinky Winky opens his present to find a beautiful star inside.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep when a voice trumpet appears singing the rhyme 'Frére Jacques'. The Teletubbies laugh and call "Again, again!"

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are very happy and have fun jumping all over Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies watch some children jumping. Tinky Winky makes up a dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy is out for a walk when a strong wind blows his hat away. The hat disappears into Home Hill, but Dipsy doesn't know where it has gone. Noo Noo blows the hat back out of Home Hill to Dipsy, who is very happy.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Noo-noo wakes up the Teletubbies to watch some children paint a huge mural using spray paints. Laa-Laa is making Tubby Custard, but the Tubby Custard machine makes a big Tubby Custard squirt on Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Po and Laa-Laa.

programme.desc: In September 1987, Simon Dale is murdered. His ex-wife, Susan Wilberforce, is acquitted of the crime but later convicted of fraud and sentenced to seven years. The murder remains unsolved.

programme.desc: After months of intimate texts with Titus, a man she met online, Candice has decided to tell to her husband. But before she does, she asks Nev to help her find out who Titus really is! (S5, ep16)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Fans of popular YouTube star Andrea Russett call on Nev and Max to help catch a potential stalker who is impersonating Andrea's family online. What the guys uncover will shock even them. (S5, ep17)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Choice
programme.desc: Paris is marked for execution when he impersonates a power-mad mystic trying to win control of a friendly country by hypnotizing its woman ruler on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Martyr

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Butterfly

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Homecoming

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ramped Up

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Wreck-Shaw

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Can radiation from electrical appliances, power lines, microwave ovens, and wireless technology such as cell phones, baby monitors, alter our DNA, and cause illnesses?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two alleged alien abductees about their claims they were taken aboard an alien space craft.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets the owners of an abnormal humanoid skull allegedly discovered in Mexico in the 1930s and a researcher who has had the skull subjected to numerous tests including carbon-14 dating, and DNA in order to determine it’s origin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Mystery of Oak Island
programme.desc: Richard investigates Canada's best-known mysteries, the Oak Island treasure. Also known as the money pit, the site has become one of the world's deepest and most costly archaeological digs.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray
programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Birthers - Obama's Birth Certificate
programme.desc: Richard interviews several prominent 'Birthers' who present evidence that proves Barack Obama is not eligible to be President because he does not meet the qualifications of a natural born citizen.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: RFID Chips
programme.desc: Could implantable RFID chips or Radio-frequency identification tags currently in widespread use in retail industry be used to surreptitiously track and control people?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Assassination of John Lennon
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show travels to New York, LA and Toronto in order to investigate the murder of John Lennon. Several researchers posit that Lennon's supposed killer Mark David Chapman was either a patsy or a mind-controlled assassin.

programme.title: Murder Maps: Finding Dr Crippen
programme.desc: Having killed his wife and buried her in the basement, Dr Crippen believed he had escaped on a ship to Canada. But the police managed to hunt him down and bring him to account for his terrible crime.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Amelia Dyer was perhaps the most prolific killer in British history. She earned a living through murder. And her victims were babies.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Herbert Armstrong, convicted in 1922 of murdering his wife, he was the first and only solicitor to be hung in UK. But was he guilty?

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC
programme.desc: From the Zeros that bombed Pearl Harbor to the rocket that could take humans to Mars, discover the secrets inside the Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London
programme.desc: From the musket shot that killed Admiral Nelson to an anti-piracy commando raid, discover the secrets inside the National Maritime Museum.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Investigating the 2010 Gulf of Mexico oil disaster; Liz takes part in wildlife rescue efforts.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Homemade gules to test stickiness; puzzle with a scientific optical illusion; supersonic car.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of genetic modification in Hawaii; shattering a glass; curing a dust allergy through eating worms.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of 'dad dancing'; Liz tracks her family tree through the use of DNA; Jem builds a singing road.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: CONSTRUCTION
programme.desc: Bridges and tunnels have transformed the way we live, making the inaccessible easy to reach, and turning time consuming journeys into convenient commutes, but when things go wrong they can go very wrong indeed.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA
programme.desc: Planes, trains and ships, our mass transit systems, have had a profound effect on mankind, making the world smaller and more connected.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: In the world of astronomy, how do we overcome the limits imposed by our own eyesight? The universe comes alive by viewing the cosmos in infrared light to gamma radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it's also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Wild Italy: From the Alps to Tuscany
programme.desc: In the episode “From the Alps to Tuscany”, the northern part of Italy is the focal point.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Iceland: Land of Fire and Ice
programme.desc: Iceland is a land born out of fire, sculpted by ice. This unique island is home to some of the planet's rarest and most spectacular creatures and it harbors some of the most extreme environments on Earth.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: Forests and jungles are home of most of the Earth’s wildlife and biodiversity.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Galapagos: Darwin's Eden
programme.desc: The Galapagos archipelago contains 13 main islands and a hundred or so smaller rocks and reefs. The region's wilderness is so pristine and rich in life. / Lying like a teardrop in the Indian Ocean, Sri Lanka is an island that defies convention.

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia
programme.desc: Indonesia’s enduring heat provides energy for it’s reptilian residents to thrive, and so much so, they outnumber it’s mammalian inhabitants.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Pantanal: Brazil's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Every year the Pantanal is drowned by immense floods, and then suffer severe drought. Yet, while people struggle, the Pantanal hosts some of the greatest gatherings of animals on the planet.

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain: How the Railways Won the War
programme.desc: The crucial roles the railways played in the two world wars.

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain: Steam Is Dead, Long Live the Railways
programme.desc: The dying days of steam, and how the railways fought back.

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea: Episode 1
programme.desc: Heading out to the Med and the Black Sea, the 280 men and women onboard face a heart attack, a man overboard, and a show of force from Russian airplanes.

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea
programme.desc: The ship and its crew are heading towards Crimea, when a Russian ship HMS Duncan has been tracking suddenly disappears. As they get closer to Crimea, the situation escalates

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea: Episode 3
programme.desc: Reports that a chemical weapon has been used in Salisbury changes the mood. When another chemical attack takes place in Syria, the ship goes to action stations for the first time.

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea: Episode 4
programme.desc: The crew stand-off with a Russian warship over Syria, and young sailor Danny tries for his first promotion, but chef Liam gets in trouble for drinking and might lose shore leave.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Surprise Ending
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Big Wipe-Out
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: You Can Bet On It!
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Fly Boy
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Guns & Ice
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Smackdown of Baby Lyssa
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Your Lying Eyes
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit on this case takes them into some parts of Ohau, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Crime Don't Pay
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble - or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Master and Duck Commander
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys transform an old pontoon boat into a floating duck blind, they are faced with the impending question of whether or not it will actually float. Meanwhile, Kay's dog Bobo misbehaves.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Inlawful Entry
programme.desc: When Missy's parents visit, her father convinces Jase to take him on a quail hunt. But while their "bonding hunt" yields very few quail, it does bring them closer together as friends. Meanwhile, Willie helps John Luke start his own snow cone business.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Flock and Key
programme.desc: Si recruits his nephews to help him transport a storage container to his backyard, but things take a turn when Jep becomes locked inside the box. Meanwhile, Jase helps Mia prepare for her cheerleading competition, but the only problem is he has no idea.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Ball in the Family

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drone Survivor
programme.desc: When Jase and Phil make a bet about whether or not human beings in a duck blind are visible from the air, Jep buys a drone copter to get a "bird's eye" view, but ends up losing it in the process.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Alan in Charge
programme.desc: Jase and the guys convince Willie to hire his older brother Alan to work at Duck Commander, but when Alan begins micromanaging everyone, they quickly change their mind. Meanwhile, the ladies take a self-defense class and use John Luke as a punching bag.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Renaissance Men

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Heroes Welcome

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Pie Hard

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Van He'llsing

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII

programme.title: WWII Air Crash Detectives

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Aims High/Flaw and Order
programme.desc: D.W. wants to be the first person to set foot on Mars! But what if scary purple aliens eat her? Who's responsible for cracking Dad's cake platter? DUN-DUN! All the evidence points to Arthur!

programme.title: Arthur: All Thumbs/Kidonia
programme.desc: When Arthur catches Buster sucking his thumb, Buster worries that Arthur will tell the entire school. Tired of doing chores, Arthur and friends decide to invent their own country. Will this kid-ruled utopia flourish or descend into anarchy?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Dummy Disaster/Francine and The Feline
programme.desc: When painfully shy George brings a ventriloquist dummy to school, a popular kid is born! Then, Arthur thinks the best pet to have is a dog, and Francine probably would have agreed--that is, until little Nemo, a cute kitten, came along.

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Big Top Trouble/George Blows His Top
programme.desc: Francine is sure she will be a star at circus camp. How hard could it be? Then, George is always more than happy to lend his pals whatever they need. But Buster's borrowing gets out of control.

programme.title: Arthur: Mom and Dad Have A Great Big Fight/D.W.'s Perfect Wish
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad fight over spilled milk, Arthur and D.W. fear the worst. Is it Arthur's fault or D.W.'s? Then, turning five is a major, big deal event! But D.W. worries that she fribbled away her preschool years on meaningless pursuits.

programme.title: Arthur: Fern and the Case of the Stolen Story/Sue Ellen Vegges Out
programme.desc: Fern has writer's block! Fortunately, Ladonna's full of stories, and Fern decides to "borrow" the tales and simply change the names. Then, when Sue Ellen decides to stop eating meat, Muffy and Francine compete to be the best vegetarian.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Tooth/D.W. Gets Lost
programme.desc: It's bad enough to wear glasses all the time. But does Arthur have to be the last person in his class to lose his baby teeth? Then, if you think being lost in a humongous department store would scare a four-year-old, think again.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Thinks Big/Arthur Cleans Up
programme.desc: Once again, Arthur gets to do everything. Mostly he gets to carry the ring in Aunt Lucy's wedding. Elwood City's park is in sad shape, and after grumbling about it, the kids find themselves volunteered to clean it up.

programme.title: Arthur: Hide And Snake/Muffy's New Best Friend
programme.desc: The kids capture a snake and learn that it's possibly poisonous--after it gets lost in Arthur's house! Why is Muffy interviewing for a new best friend? She and Francine are usually inseparable, but lately it seems they have less in common.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Barney and Friends: On Again, Off Again

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A New Friend

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Superhero for a Day

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Back to the Egg
programme.desc: The foursome are dining out on their favourite food when Michelangelo and Leonardo are suddenly transformed into two five year-olds, thanks to Shredder's latest invention - an age-reversing serum.

programme.title: Star Kid

programme.title: Timber Kings: Wilderness Retreat

programme.title: Timber Kings: German Efficiency
programme.desc: Beat’s schedule is thrown by German customs and there’s only one way to catch up, Bryan Sr. takes Peter to the wilderness and they harvest 200-foot trees.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Arkansas Shuffle
programme.desc: Beat sets logs in the pouring Arkansas rain for a client who orders renovations on the fly, a Catholic priest convinces Bryan Sr. and Peter to build a wedding gazebo for free.

programme.title: Timber Kings: The Boss Can Build
programme.desc: André the GM and master salesman must go to Ontario and lead his first build in more than 10 years, Beat has to collaborate in carving a hairy friend.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Old Dog, New Tricks
programme.desc: Bryan Sr. resurrects an ancient crane dubbed Rust Bucket to complete a remote fishing cabin. Meanwhile, Beat struggles with two huge projects competing for time and square footage on the work yard.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Cold War

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Misguided Missal
programme.desc: A 15th century prayer volume disappears from a sealed casket inside a locked safe belonging to an Oxford Don; the supernatural is suspected.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Deadly Gift

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Lively Ghost
programme.desc: A phony spiritualist believes she's truly summoned a real ghost. Colonel March attends her séance to discover the identity of the spirit's killer.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death in the Dressing Room
programme.desc: Murder and blackmail culminate when a call for help during a Javenese dance is the clue that Colonel March needs to prove a faulty alibi.

programme.desc: Colonel March receives a queer complaint: a pair of disembodied gloves killed a manand there is no corpse, no blood, and no evidence of wrongdoing,

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Passage At Arms
programme.desc: A woman is found dead, but was it suicide or murder? A French fencing match provides the telling clue.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Sorcerer
programme.desc: A psychologist is stabbed to death in a seemingly sealed room. Inspector March must find who killed him and how did they accomplish the task.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Present Tense

programme.desc: Catherine and Brass investigate when dominatrix Lady Heather is almost strangled to death.

programme.desc: The CSIs work with the FBI to investigate the murders of a young boy and a woman.

programme.title: Scorpion: Scorp Family Robinson

programme.desc: Chris and Andy face a tough decision while investigating a vicious beating; Sam and Luke get competitive during a retraining exercise.

programme.title: Rookie Blue

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: In some cases, the transformation from everyday woman to brutal killer is activated by a man. A boyfriend or husband can become the focus of a deadly obsession.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: No one doubts a woman’s capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal. In the ultimate fatal attraction, "Deadly Women" looks at cases of murder driven by obsessive love.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Behind lace-curtained windows and beneath sensible haircuts lurked evil. Appearances were deceptive. We did not notice these female killers walking by. These women wore a mask of sanity.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Lost Boys
programme.desc: In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: A medium experiences the torture of a prison snitch killed by other inmates. Two soldiers in Iraq are startled by ghostly encounters in abandoned bunkers; and a police officer witnesses paranormal activity in a deserted spa.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: A couple is haunted by the spirit of a little boy who lives in their young son's bedroom closet. A gas station owner's life is abruptly changed by the appearance of a mysterious paranormal mist with a demonic presence.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: Two men retire without knowing their new home sits on the graves of people who were tortured and murdered by the KKK. The Queen Mary once ruled the high seas, but now ghosts roam her decks.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: A woman under assault by an aggressive entity is rescued by the spirit of her deceased son. A maid who was murdered in the 19th century continues to work at an old Texas hotel.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: The suburban house of two young cousins is filled with scary encounters after a demonic ceramic giraffe is brought into their home.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Winston's Secret

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Bad Trip

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: House of Horrors
